declared.title: Tanzania blocked Twitter/X
declared.selection_rationale: OONI Findings-platform incident report on a 30 August 2024 blocking of Twitter/X in Tanzania -- a distinct, earlier dated event from this corpus's existing 2025 X-platform-blocking entry (ooni-tz-2025-x-platform-blocking), same pattern already established for the Kenya KCSE exam-blocking entries (each dated event gets its own account, not merged). Confirmed substantive via the Findings API's own `text` field (~750 words, well over this file's 500-word floor): detailed technical account of TLS interference via ClientHello-message SNI inspection, explicitly distinguishing genuine censorship (observed on Vodacom Tanzania, Habari, Tigo, Airtel) from a separate corporate-filtering false positive (a Sophos MITM device on a different network) that could have been mistaken for the same thing -- a methodological nuance worth preserving, not just a bare "X was blocked" claim. Publication date: the API's own `start_time` field.
